path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(204, 102, 0), rgb(212, 125, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(204, 102, 0), rgb(212, 125, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 153), rgb(31, 31, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 153), rgb(31, 31, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
